data.title: The Hackett Group® Identifies Top Collections, Dispute, Deduction Management Software Vendors
data.description: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc., a prominent Gen AI consultancy and digital transformation firm listed on NASDAQ as HCKT, recently published its newest Digital World Class® Matrix. This matrix concentrates on the collections, dispute, and deduction management software sector. The report assesses the capabilities of top software vendors, emphasizing the significant link between AI-driven touchless collection processes, faster dispute resolution cycles, and enhanced cash flow. The findings highlight the importance of AI in optimizing collection activities and improving financial outcomes.

data.title: Asha Therapeutics Launches as First Atom Therapeutics, a Zero-Shot De Novo Drug Design Company
data.description: Asha Therapeutics, based in Tampa, Florida, has recently emerged as the pioneer Atom Therapeutics entity, specializing in zero-shot de novo drug design. Utilizing advanced AI-powered molecular design technology, the company aims to revolutionize the drug development landscape.

data.title: Comcast Business Launches Total Solutions Advantage: Simplified, All-In Plans for Small Businesses Starting at $60 per Month
data.description: In Philadelphia, Comcast Business introduced Total Solutions Advantage, a set of comprehensive technology bundles for small businesses. These plans include high-speed connectivity and cybersecurity features, all at a fixed monthly cost. Aimed at simplifying operations for small business owners, these offerings leverage Comcast Business' extensive fiber network.Total Solutions Advantage streamlines services, enhances security, and enables businesses to concentrate on their core operations.

data.title: Casinofy Unveils Next-Generation Platform Redesign with AI-Powered Chat, Setting a New Standard for the Online Casino Industry
data.description: In Sliema, Malta, on March 30, 2026, Casinofy unveiled their revamped online casino platform. The upgrade includes advanced AI chat technology, a refreshed user interface, and a range of new features. This update showcases Casinofy's commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry.

data.title: PFAS Waste Management Market worth $2.98 billion in 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on March 30, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets that the PFAS Waste Management Market is experiencing significant growth. The market is segmented by Treatment Technology including Destruction, Recycling & Recovery, and others, as well as by Service Type such as On-site and Off-site. End-use industries involved are Industrial, Commercial, and Municipal sectors. This global market analysis encompasses various regions worldwide.

data.title: Viva Biotech Announces 2025 Annual Results: AI-Driven Drug Discovery Reinforces Industry Leadership, CDMO Commercial Products Enter Rapid Scale-Up
data.description: In the latest financial report, revenue hit RMB1,729.4 million with a gross profit of RMB655.6 million. The gross profit margin rose to 37.9%, marking a year-on-year increase of 3.3 percentage points. Net profit surged to RMB269.3 million, up by 21.3% from the previous year. Additionally, the adjusted non-IFRS net profit saw a substantial increase to RMB335.3 million compared to the previous year.

data.title: A New Era at Jeptha Creed: Expanded Distillery Experiences Arrive In 2026
data.description: In 2026, Jeptha Creed Distillery, located in Shelbyville, Kentucky, has become a must-visit destination for bourbon enthusiasts. This craft producer, led by women, now offers new barrel tastings, immersive distillery tours, and other exciting experiences. Situated in Kentucky, the heart of bourbon country, Jeptha Creed Distillery promises a unique and memorable visit.

data.title: Anti-union advocates cheer setbacks at Wells Fargo
data.description: Supporters of right-to-work legislation are celebrating the recent defeats of unions at Wells Fargo as an indication that the surge in interest for organized labor during the Biden administration has halted.

data.title: Air Canada's CEO Michael Rousseau to resign after backlash for English-only comments post crash, airline to focus on French-speaking successor.
data.description: Following a runway collision, Michael Rousseau faced backlash for his predominantly English statement. The airline received criticism and announced plans to prioritize French proficiency in their search for a new leader.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Heaviest Single-Day Bleed Of The Week With $225M Exodus
data.description: During the week ending March 27, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows amounting to $296 million amidst the U.S.-Iran conflict. The most substantial outflow of $225.5 million occurred on March 27, marking the highest single-day depletion for the week. Notably, BlackRock's IBIT fund saw a $201.5 million decrease on that day, the most significant outflow by a single fund within the five-day trading period. Total net assets for U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs plummeted by 7.5%, dropping from a peak of $91.7 billion on March 23 to $84.8 billion by the end of the week. This reversal in momentum followed a series of weeks with healthy inflows. Additionally, Ethereum investment products saw the largest global withdrawals of $222 million, leading to a year-to-date net outflow of $273 million, marking the weakest performance among major cryptocurrencies.
